case_title: REALTY HOUSE WEST, INC. vs. SILVERA, RASHAD et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REALTY HOUSE WEST, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SILVERA, RASHAD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 380 EDDY ST #407, LEASE FORFEITED, NOTATION DONE ON ORIGINAL INSTRUMENT PER C.R.C. 522 INCLUDES ALL TENANTS, SUBTENANTS, NAMED CLAIMANTS, AND OTHER OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES PER C.C.P. 415.46.
